headline: The Catalyst Is Coming for United Parcel Service. Here's Why Smart Investors Are Buying Before July.
summary: United Parcel Service is about to hit an inflection point, which will become even more clear after second quarter earnings.

headline: A Look At United Parcel Service’s Valuation As RFID And Happy Returns Expansion Gains Attention
summary: United Parcel Service (UPS) has drawn fresh attention after expanding its Happy Returns drop off network to 10,000 U.S. locations and deploying RFID sensing across its small package infrastructure, reshaping how returns and tracking work for shippers. See our latest analysis for United Parcel Service. These RFID and Happy Returns updates land while UPS shares trade at US$107.02, with a 30 day share price return of 12.89% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 16.78%. However, the 3 and 5...
